data.name: AboutForm_freeLabel_Text
data.value: Purple Pen is free software and may be copied and shared.

data.name: AboutForm_disclaimerLabel_Text
data.value: THIS SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED BY THE COPYRIGHT HOLDERS AND CONTRIBUTORS "AS IS" AND ANY EXPRESS OR IMPLIED WARRANTIES, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, THE IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE ARE DISCLAIMED.

data.name: AddCourse_secondaryTitleDescription_Text
data.value: The following (optional) text will appear on the second line of the control description sheet:

data.name: AddForkDialog_labelWhichType_Text
data.value: What type of variation would you like to add?

data.name: AddForkDialog_labelSummary_Text
data.value: The loop control will be visited 4 times. There are 24 different ways through the loops.

data.name: AddTextLine_textLineLabel_Text
data.value: Enter text to place on separate line of control descriptions:

data.name: AllControlsProperties_allControlsPropertiesLabel_Text
data.value: These settings control how the map and descriptions for All Controls are printed.

data.name: AutoNumbering_disallowInvertibleCheckBox_Text
data.value: Disallow codes that could be read upside-down (e.g., "68"/"89")

data.name: NewEventNumbering_disallowInvertibleCheckBox_Text
data.value: Disallow codes that could be read upside-down (e.g., "68"/"89")

data.name: AutoNumbering_newControlsOnlyRadioButton_Text
data.value: Apply these settings to newly created controls only

data.name: AutoNumbering_automaticNumberingLabel_Text
data.value: Newly created controls are automatically numbered according to the following settings.

data.name: ChangeAllCodes_changeControlCodesLabel_Text
data.value: To change the code for one or more controls,click in the "New Code" column and enter the new code.

data.name: ChangeCourseOrder_courseOrderLabel_Text
data.value: Use the "Move Up" and "Move Down" buttons to change the order that courses are listed in the user interface, reports, and printing.

data.name: NewEventMapFile_openFileDialog_Filter
data.value: All map files|*.ocd;*.omap;*.xmap;*.pdf;*.jpeg;*.jpg;*.tiff;*.tif;*.bmp;*.png;*.gif|OCAD files (*.ocd)|*.ocd|Open Orienteering Mapper Files|*.omap;*.xmap|PDF files (*.pdf)|*.pdf|Image files|*.jpeg;*.jpg;*.tiff;*.tif;*.bmp;*.png;*.gif

data.name: ChangeSpecialCourses_changeDisplayedCoursesLabel_Text
data.value: Choose the courses on which that this object will be displayed:

data.name: CourseAppearanceDialog_labelBlendPurple_Text
data.value: Blend purple with underlying map colours:

data.name: CourseAppearanceDialog_checkBoxOverprint_Text
data.value: Use overprint effect for colours marked "overprint"

data.name: CourseLoad_courseLoadLabel_Text
data.value: Set the number of competitors on each course by clicking in the second column and typing a number.

data.name: CoursePartProperties_checkBoxDisplayFinish_Text
data.value: Display finish circle on this course part

data.name: CoursePartProperties_label1_Text
data.value: These settings control the appearance of this part of a multi-part course.

data.name: CreateGpx_headerLabel_Text
data.value: A GPX File contains GPS coordinates for controls, and can be loaded onto a GPS or smartphone to verify the correct location of controls.

data.name: CreateImageFiles_folderBrowserDialog_Description
data.value: Select a folder for the OCAD files

data.name: CreateKmlFiles_folderBrowserDialog_Description
data.value: Select a folder for the OCAD files

data.name: CreateOcadFiles_folderBrowserDialog_Description
data.value: Select a folder for the OCAD files

data.name: CreateRouteGadget_folderBrowserDialog_Description
data.value: Select a folder for the OCAD files

data.name: CreateImageFiles_coursesDirectory_Text
data.value: Same folder as Purple Pen file

data.name: CreateKmlFiles_coursesDirectory_Text
data.value: Same folder as Purple Pen file

data.name: CreateOcadFiles_coursesDirectory_Text
data.value: Same folder as Purple Pen file

data.name: CreatePdfCourses_coursesDirectory_Text
data.value: Same folder as Purple Pen file

data.name: CreateRouteGadget_coursesDirectory_Text
data.value: Same folder as Purple Pen file

data.name: CreatePdfCourses_checkBoxMergeParts_Text
data.value: Print Map Exchanges on Same Map

data.name: PrintCourses_checkBoxMergeParts_Text
data.value: Print Map Exchanges on Same Map

data.name: CreatePdfCourses_labelAppearanceInfo_Text
data.value: If the print area is too large to fit on one page:

data.name: PrintCourses_labelAppearanceInfo_Text
data.value: If the print area is too large to fit on one page:

data.name: CreatePdfCourses_folderBrowserDialog_Description
data.value: Select a folder for the PDF files

data.name: CreateRouteGadget_label1_Text
data.value: Enter the name (without .xml or .gif) for both of the RouteGadget files:

data.name: CreateRouteGadget_label2_Text
data.value: RouteGadget requires both an image file (.gif) and IOF XML file (.xml). Choose the name and folder for both of these files.

data.name: CustomSymbolText_labelChooseLanguage_Text
data.value: Choose the language used for textual control descriptions:

data.name: CustomSymbolText_labelCustomizeText_Text
data.value: Click on a description symbol to customise the text that is used in textual control descriptions.

data.name: CustomSymbolText_checkBoxDefaultLanguage_Text
data.value: Make this the default language for new events

data.name: EnterSymbolText_labelDescription_Text
data.value: Enter the customised text for the symbol in the "Text" column.

data.name: InitialScreen_label1_Text
data.value: Purple Pen is free software and may be copied and shared. Development of Purple Pen is supported only by your donations.

data.name: LegAssignmentsDialog_labelDescription_Text
data.value: To assign a specific leg to a specific branch, type the leg number(s) below. Legs not assigned to a branch will be distributed among remaining branches randomly.

data.name: LicenseForm_bsdLicenseLinkLabel_Text
data.value: Purple Pen is provided under a "BSD"-style licence.

data.name: MiscText_CannotLoadFile
data.value: Cannot load '{0}' for the following reason:

data.name: MiscText_CannotSaveFile
data.value: Cannot save '{0}' for the following reason:

data.name: MiscText_CannotLoadMapFile
data.value: Cannot load map file '{0}' for the following reason:

data.name: MiscText_CannotPrint
data.value: Cannot print '{0}' for the following reason:

data.name: MiscText_CannotCreateFile
data.value: Cannot create '{0}' for the following reason:

data.name: MiscText_CannotCreateDirectory
data.value: Cannot create folder '{0}' for the following reason:

data.name: MiscText_CannotReadMap
data.value: Cannot read map for the following reason: '{0}' Using Optimize/Repair and re-saving in OCAD may fix problems.

data.name: MiscText_CannotCreateOcadFiles
data.value: Cannot create OCAD files for the following reason:

data.name: MiscText_SaveChanges
data.value: Do you want to save the changes you made to '{0}'?

data.name: MiscText_FileAlreadyExists
data.value: File '{0}' already exists in the specified folder. Click the "Back" button and choose a new folder or a new event title.

data.name: MiscText_CodeInUse
data.value: The control code '{0}' is already used by another control.

data.name: MiscText_BadScore
data.value: The points for a control must be an integer 1-999.

data.name: MiscText_BadClimb
data.value: The climb for a course must be a number 0-9999, or blank.

data.name: MiscText_BadLoad
data.value: The load for a course must be an integer 0-999999, or blank.

data.name: MiscText_EnterDimensions
data.value: Enter feature size Use / for height on a slope Use | for two features

data.name: MiscText_EnterEventTitle
data.value: Enter new event title Use | to separate lines (affects all courses)

data.name: MiscText_EnterSecondaryTitle
data.value: Enter new secondary title Use | to separate lines

data.name: MiscText_EnterSymbolText
data.value: Enter new symbol meaning (affects all courses)

data.name: MiscText_EnterTextLine
data.value: Enter new text Use | to separate lines

data.name: MiscText_DeleteMultipleControlsFromControlsCollection
data.value: Controls {0} are no longer used by any course. Do you want to delete these controls from the control collection?

data.name: MiscText_DeleteControlFromControlsCollection
data.value: Control {0} is no longer used by any course. Do you want to delete this control from the control collection?

data.name: MiscText_DeleteControlFromAllControls
data.value: Control {0} is currently used by the following courses: {1}. Do you want to delete this control anyway?

data.name: MiscText_CodeBadLength
data.value: A control code must be one, two, or three letters or digits.

data.name: MiscText_CodeContainsSpace
data.value: A control code must not contain a space.

data.name: MiscText_CodeBeginsWithZero
data.value: A control code should not begin with zero.

data.name: MiscText_CodeCouldBeUpsideDown
data.value: A control code should not look like another number when upside-down.

data.name: MiscText_DuplicateCode
data.value: The code "{0}" is used more than once.

data.name: MiscText_BadScale
data.value: The print scale must be a number between 100 and 100,000.

data.name: MiscText_PageTooSmall
data.value: The page size is too small for any descriptions to be printed.

data.name: MiscText_NewerVersionAvailable
data.value:
Version {0} of Purple Pen is now available for download. (You are currently running version {1}.)
Would you like to download and install the latest version?

data.name: MiscText_HelpFileNotFound
data.value: Help file '{0}' could not be opened.

data.name: MiscText_MissingMapFile
data.value:
The map file "{0}" could not be found.
Most likely, the map file has been moved or deleted, or the Purple Pen file has been moved (possibly to a different computer). The map file must be present every time the Purple Pen event file is loaded. If you send a Purple Pen event file to another person, be sure that person has a copy of the map file also.
After pressing OK, try to find a copy of the map file on your computer.

data.name: MiscText_NoUnusedControls
data.value: All controls are used in a course.

data.name: MiscText_RequireStar
data.value: The customised text requires a "*" to indicate where the object being modified is placed.

data.name: MiscText_AddTextSpecialExplanation
data.value: Enter the text you wish to place on the map. After pressing OK, drag the mouse to place the text in the desired location.

data.name: MiscText_MapFileChanged
data.value: Another program has changed the map file "{0}". Purple Pen will now reload the map.

data.name: MiscText_ChangeDescriptionLanguage
data.value: The current event has textual control descriptions in {0}. Would you like to change the language of control descriptions to {1}?

data.name: MiscText_ClosePPBeforeLoadingOCAD
data.value: Purple Pen must be closed before loading the created OCAD files.

data.name: MiscText_NoCoursesSelected
data.value: No courses were selected to print.

data.name: MiscText_TranslatedHelpWebSite
data.value: *** Eğer Mor Kalem için çevirilen dilde belgeler içeren bir internet sitesi bulunuyorsa, bu öğenin çevirisi olarak URL'yi (http içerecek şekilde) girin. Aksi halde boş bırakın.

data.name: MiscText_CrashIntro
data.value: An error has occurred. In order to help us fix the problem, please enter your email address and additional information, and send us an error report.

data.name: MiscText_CrashMessage
data.value: Please tell us what you were doing in the program, to help fix the problem

data.name: MiscText_PdfConversionFailed
data.value: Pdfium PDF converter failed to read PDF file successfully

data.name: MiscText_PdfResultNotReadable
data.value: Could not read result of PDF conversion from file '{0}'

data.name: MiscText_CannotCreatePdfs
data.value: Cannot create PDFs for the following reason:

data.name: MiscText_MapFileDeleted
data.value: The map file "{0}" has been deleted. Please try to restore the map file, then press "Ok".

data.name: MiscText_BadDotNetFramework
data.value: The .NET framework on your computer does not appear to be correctly installed. Please visit http://microsoft.com/net and install the latest version of the .NET framework for your Windows operating system.

data.name: MiscText_AddLineExplanation
data.value: Set the appearance of the line. After pressing OK, drag the mouse to draw the line segments in the desired location.

data.name: MiscText_AddRectangleExplanation
data.value: Set the appearance of the rectangle. After pressing OK, drag the mouse to place the rectangle in the desired location.

data.name: MiscText_ChangeLineAppearanceExplanation
data.value: Change the appearance of the line or rectangle.

data.name: MiscText_GpxMustBeOcadMap
data.value: The map file must be an OCAD file to use GPX files.

data.name: MiscText_GpxMustHaveCoordSystem
data.value: The OCAD file must have a coordinate system defined to use GPX files.

data.name: MiscText_GpxMustHaveRealWorldCoord
data.value: The OCAD file must have real world coordinates defined to use GPX files.

data.name: MiscText_GpxReprojectFailure
data.value: Could not reproject points; either the coordinate system or the real world coordinates in the OCAD map are wrong.

data.name: MiscText_GpxUnsupportedCoordSystem
data.value: The OCAD file uses a coordinate system that is not supported by Purple Pen.

data.name: MiscText_BadLength
data.value: The length for a course must be a number 0.1 - 99.9, or blank to calculate length automatically.

data.name: MiscText_EnterLength
data.value: Enter length in km, or leave blank to calculate automatically

data.name: MiscText_PausePrinting
data.value: Finished printing "{0}". Press OK to begin printing "{1}".

data.name: MiscText_ForkSummary
data.value: Suitable for use in relays with {0} participants per team.

data.name: MiscText_LoopSummary
data.value: The central control in the loop will be visited {0} times. There are {1} possible paths through the loops.

data.name: MiscText_CantRearrangeSplitControl
data.value: A control that starts a fork or loop cannot be dragged to a new place in the course.

data.name: MiscText_TooManyVariations
data.value: Too many total variations in this course. The number of distinct variations is limited to {0}.

data.name: MiscText_VariationAlreadyExists
data.value: A variation already exists at this control.

data.name: MiscText_VariationMustSelectControl
data.value: A control or leg must be selected to add a variation.

data.name: MiscText_VariationNotFinish
data.value: A variation cannot be added to a finish control.

data.name: MiscText_VariationNotInAllControls
data.value: A variation cannot be added to the All Controls view.

data.name: MiscText_VariationNotInScoreCourse
data.value: A variation cannot be added to a score course.

data.name: MiscText_VariationNotLastControl
data.value: A variation cannot be added to the last control. Add a finish control first.

data.name: MiscText_BadLegNumber
data.value: '{0}' is not a valid leg number for branch '{1}'

data.name: MiscText_LegNotAssigned
data.value: Leg {0} should be assigned to one of branches {1}

data.name: MiscText_LegUsedTwice
data.value: Leg {0} is assigned to both branch '{1}' and branch '{2}'

data.name: MiscText_CannotReadMapOOM
data.value: Cannot read map for the following reason: '{0}' Opening and re-saving the map in the latest version of OpenOrienteering Mapper may fix problems.

data.name: MiscText_BaseMapHasVisibleTemplatesThatMayNotAppear
data.value: The underlying OCAD map has visible template files. In OCAD 8 and below, these templates may not appear due to limitations in OCAD.

data.name: MiscText_ImagesMayAppearBadlyLayeredInOcad10Below
data.value: Due to limitations of the OCAD file format (in OCAD 10 and below), image objects will appear underneath courses and white out areas in the exported OCAD files. Please check the OCAD files to make sure your images appear as desired.

data.name: MiscText_CannotCreateImageFiles
data.value: Cannot create image files for the following reason:

data.name: MiscText_LegAssignedOuterBranch
data.value: Leg {0} never reaches branch '{1}': it was assigned to go a different way in a containing fork.

data.name: MiscText_AddEllipseExplanation
data.value: Set the appearance of the ellipse. After pressing OK, drag the mouse to place the ellipse in the desired location.

data.name: MiscText_UninstallNonStoreVersion
data.value: An older version of Purple Pen is still installed. To prevent confusion caused by having two versions of Purple Pen installed, it is strongly recommended that the older version be removed. Remove it now?

data.name: MiscText_AskInstallRobotoFonts
data.value: In order for OCAD or OpenOrienteering Mapper to correctly display the control descriptions, the "Roboto" and "Roboto Condensed" fonts must be installed on your system. Would you like to install those fonts now (strongly recommended)?

data.name: MissingFonts_checkBoxDontWarnAgain_Text
data.value: Don't warn about missing fonts for this event again

data.name: MissingFonts_labelWarning_Text
data.value:
Map file "{0}" uses fonts that are not installed on your computer. Text using these fonts will be drawn and printed with a default font, which may cause text to appear differently than the map designer intended.
To fix this problem, find and install the fonts listed below with the Windows Control Panel, then start Purple Pen again.

data.name: MoveAllControls_labelDescription_Text
data.value: Which way would you like to move all controls on the map?

data.name: NewEventBitmapScale_bitmapScaleLabel_Text
data.value:
When using an image file as a map, you must specify the resolution of the image and the map scale.
The resolution of the image indicates how may pixels or dots are in the image for each inch on the paper map; usually termed dots per inch or "dpi".
The scale of the map indicates the relationship between the paper map and the real world.

data.name: NewEventBitmapScale_pdfScaleLabel_Text
data.value:
When using an PDF file as a map, you must specify the map scale.
The scale of the map indicates the relationship between the paper map and the real world.

data.name: NewEventDirectory_newEventDirectoryLabel_Text
data.value: In what folder (directory) do you want to save your course event file?

data.name: NewEventDirectory_useMapDirectory_Text
data.value: In the same folder as the map file.

data.name: NewEventDirectory_folderBrowserDialog_Description
data.value: Select the folder for your event file

data.name: NewEventFinal_newEventFinalLabel_Text
data.value: Click "Finish" to create your new event. Your event file will be saved as:

data.name: NewEventFinal_afterEventCreatedLabel_Text
data.value: After your event is created, select "New Course..." from the Course menu to create one or more courses.

data.name: NewEventMapFile_newEventMapFileLabel_Text
data.value: In order to design your courses, you must select the map file you will be using. Typically this is an OCAD or OpenOrienteering Mapper file (although PDFs and image files like JPEGs can be used instead). Click the "Choose..." button to select a map file.

data.name: NewEventMapFile_infoMessage_Text
data.value: The map file was successfully loaded. If you send your Purple Pen file to someone else, they must have the map file also.

data.name: NewEventNumbering_newEventNumberingLabel_Text
data.value: Newly created controls are automatically numbered. Please choose the starting control number to use.

data.name: NewEventNumbering_changeLaterLabel_Text
data.value: (This setting can be changed later using Controls/Automatic Numbering)

data.name: NewEventPrintScale_newEventPrintScaleLabel_Text
data.value: What scale will you be using to print your courses? In most cases, you will want to use the existing scale of the map.

data.name: NewEventPrintScale_changeLaterLabel_Text
data.value: (You can change the printing scale later for any course by choosing Course/Properties.)

data.name: NewEventStandards_changeLaterLabel_Text
data.value: (These settings can be changed later using Event/IOF Standards)

data.name: NewEventStandards_labelStandardsIntro_Text
data.value: Which versions of IOF standards would you like Purple Pen to follow?

data.name: NewEventTitle_newEventTitleLabel_Text
data.value:
The event title will be displayed on the first line of every control description sheet. It is also used as the file name for storing your event on disk.
To fit on the description sheet, it should be less than 25 characters in length. Examples of good event titles are "US Champs Day 1" or "Riverview Park, 12/4/06".

data.name: NonPrintableObjects_labelWarning_Text
data.value:
Map file "{0}" contains objects or symbols that are not fully supported by Purple Pen, and may not print correctly. The objects that may not print correctly are listed below.
For printing competition maps, it is suggested that courses be exported to OCAD files (use File/Create OCAD Files...) and that the maps be printed from OCAD.

data.name: NonPrintableObjects_Text
data.value: Map File Cannot Be Printed Accurately

data.name: OverwritingOcadFilesDialog_confirmReplaceLabel_Text
data.value: The following files already exist. If you continue, they will be replaced.

data.name: PdfConversionInProgress_labelReadingPDF_Text
data.value: PDFium PDF converter is reading your PDF...

data.name: PdfConversionInProgress_labelFailure_Text
data.value: PDF reading has failed. The errors are shown below.

data.name: PrintCourses_checkBoxPausePrinting_Text
data.value: Pause printing after each course or part

data.name: PunchPatternDialog_punchPatternsLabel_Text
data.value: Click on a control code in the left-hand list, and design the pin-punch pattern on the right-hand side. Red codes indicate controls that have no punch pattern defined.

data.name: ReportText_EventAudit_CloseTogetherExplanation
data.value: The following table shows all control pairs that are within {0} metres of each other. The same symbol column shows whether the two controls have the same primary symbol (column D).

data.name: ReportText_EventAudit_MissingClimb
data.value: Regular courses should indicate the amount of climb

data.name: ReportText_EventAudit_MissingD
data.value: All controls must have a main feature in column D

data.name: ReportText_EventAudit_MissingEBetween
data.value: When "between" is in column G, two features must be shown in columns D and E

data.name: ReportText_EventAudit_MissingEJunction
data.value: When "junction" or "crossing" is in column F, two features must be shown in columns D and E

data.name: ReportText_EventAudit_MissingFinish
data.value: Regular courses should have a finish circle

data.name: ReportText_EventAudit_MissingLoad
data.value: Course should have expected competitor load

data.name: ReportText_EventAudit_MissingScore
data.value: Score courses should have scores set for all controls or for no controls

data.name: ReportText_EventAudit_MissingStart
data.value: Regular courses should have a start triangle

data.name: ReportText_EventAudit_MissingStartScore
data.value: Score courses should have a start triangle

data.name: ReportText_EventAudit_RepeatControl
data.value: Course "{0}" contains control "{1}" twice in a row.

data.name: ReportText_EventAudit_UnusedControlsExplanation
data.value: The following controls are present in the All Controls collection but are not used in any course. To remove them, use the "Remove Unused Controls" command on the "Event" menu. These controls will not be considered further in this report.

data.name: ReportText_Load_ButterflyExists
data.value: Some controls are visited multiple times on the same course. The second load number counts each visit to a control separately.

data.name: ReportText_Load_MissingLoads
data.value: Some or all courses do not have competitor loads set for them. The loads listed below may be incorrect or missing for this reason. To set competitor loads, select "Competitor Load" from the "Course" menu.

data.name: ReportText_Load_OnlyLegsMoreThanOnce
data.value: (only legs used by more than one course appear in the following table)

data.name: ReportText_Load_VariationsExist
data.value: One or more courses has variations. Load numbers will be computed assuming that competitors are evenly distributed between forks.

data.name: ReportText_RelayVariation_BranchWarning
data.value: Warning: due to the number of legs specified, the fork at control {0} will not be used evenly. {1} leg(s) will use branch(es) {2}, while {3} leg(s) will use branch(es) {4}.

data.name: ReportText_RelayVariation_NoTeams
data.value: No relay teams have been defined yet. Selected the desired number of teams and legs and press the "Assign Variations" button.

data.name: SelectionDescriptionText_TextLine_AboveAllCourses
data.value: Appears above {0}, in all courses that contain {0}

data.name: SelectionDescriptionText_TextLine_AboveThisCourse
data.value: Appears above {0}, in this course only

data.name: SelectionDescriptionText_TextLine_BelowAllCourses
data.value: Appears below {0}, in all courses that contain {0}

data.name: SelectionDescriptionText_TextLine_BelowThisCourse
data.value: Appears below {0}, in this course only

data.name: SelectLocationsForMove_labelFirstControl_Text
data.value: Select first control or registration mark to move

data.name: SelectLocationsForMove_labelSecondNewLocation_Text
data.value: Choose new location for second control/mark

data.name: SelectLocationsForMove_labelSecondControl_Text
data.value: Select second control or registration mark to move

data.name: SelectLocationsForMove_labelFirstNewLocation_Text
data.value: Choose new location for first control/mark

data.name: SelectVariations_labelAllVariations_Text
data.value: Display all the forks together on a single map.

data.name: SelectVariations_labelSeparateVariations_Text
data.value: One map for each possible variation through the course.

data.name: SelectVariations_labelByLeg_Text
data.value: One map for each leg on the relay teams that you choose.

data.name: SelectVariations_labelByLegNotAvailable_Text
data.value: You must first define relay teams by selecting Relay Team Variations... from the Course menu.

data.name: SelectVariations_labelNumberOfTeams_Text
data.value: This course has {0} relay teams assigned. Use Relay Team Variations... from the Course menu to change the number of teams.

data.name: SetPrintAreaDialog_setPrintAreaLabel_Text
data.value: Set the desired printing area by dragging with the mouse.

data.name: SetPrintAreaDialog_checkBoxFixSizeToPaper_Text
data.value: Fix Print Area Size to Paper Size

data.name: SetUILanguage_introLabel_Text
data.value: Select the language that you would like to use for the user interface of Purple Pen (menus, windows, etc.)

data.name: StatusBarText_DefaultStatus
data.value: Left mouse button: select object; Right mouse button: move map; Scroll wheel: zoom in/out

data.name: StatusBarText_DefaultRectangle
data.value: Left mouse button: move/size rectangle; Right mouse button: move map; Scroll wheel: zoom in/out

data.name: StatusBarText_DragObject
data.value: Hold down left mouse button and drag to move selected object

data.name: StatusBarText_DragCorner
data.value: Hold down left mouse button and drag corner point to move it

data.name: StatusBarText_DraggingObject
data.value: Move object to desired location and release mouse button

data.name: StatusBarText_DraggingCorner
data.value: Move corner point to desired location and release mouse button

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingControl
data.value: Click left mouse button to place new control

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingExistingControl
data.value: Click left mouse button to add existing control "{0}" to course

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingStart
data.value: Click left mouse button to place new start

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingExistingStart
data.value: Click left mouse button to add existing start to course

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingFinish
data.value: Click left mouse button to place new finish

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingExistingFinish
data.value: Click left mouse button to add existing finish to course

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingCrossingPoint
data.value: Click left mouse button to place new mandatory crossing point

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingExistingCrossingPoint
data.value: Click left mouse button to add existing mandatory crossing point to course

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingObject
data.value: Click left mouse button to place new object

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingBend
data.value: Click left mouse button at the location of the bend

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingCorner
data.value: Click left mouse button to add a new corner

data.name: StatusBarText_DeletingBend
data.value: Click left mouse button on a bend to remove it

data.name: StatusBarText_DeletingCorner
data.value: Click left mouse button on a corner to remove it

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingControlGap
data.value: Click left mouse button on the control circle to add a small gap; hold down left mouse button and drag to create a large gap

data.name: StatusBarText_RemovingControlGap
data.value: Click left mouse button on a gap in the control circle to remove it

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingLegGap
data.value: Click left mouse button to create small gap; hold down left mouse button and drag to create a large gap in the leg

data.name: StatusBarText_RemovingLegGap
data.value: Click left mouse button on a gap in the leg to remove it

data.name: StatusBarText_SizeRectangle
data.value: Hold down left mouse button and drag to size the selected object

data.name: StatusBarText_SizingRectangle
data.value: Move edge(s) to desired location and release mouse button

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingDescription
data.value: Hold down left mouse button and drag to create control descriptions

data.name: StatusBarText_RotatingObject
data.value: Click left mouse button when the crossing point is rotated to the correct angle

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingLineArea
data.value: Hold down left mouse button and drag to add a line segment; click the left mouse button to finish adding object

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingText
data.value: Hold down left mouse button and drag to create text

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingExistingMapExchange
data.value: Click left mouse button to add existing map exchange to course

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingMapExchange
data.value: Click left mouse button to place new map exchange

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingMapExchangeToControl
data.value: Click left mouse button to add map exchange at control "{0}"

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingRectangle
data.value: Hold down left mouse button and drag to create object

data.name: StatusBarText_DraggingTopologyObject
data.value: Drag control number to reorder it in the course (hold shift to duplicate)

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingExistingMapIssue
data.value: Click left mouse button to add existing map issue point to course

data.name: StatusBarText_AddingMapIssue
data.value: Click left mouse button to place new map issue point

data.name: StatusBarText_StretchingObject
data.value: Hold down left mouse button and drag to stretch the stretch the crossing point

data.name: StatusBarText_ControlForMoveAllControls
data.value: Click the left mouse button on a control or registration mark to move to a new location

data.name: StatusBarText_NewLocationForMoveAllControls
data.value: Click the left mouse button on the new location for the control or registration mark

data.name: UnusedControls_unusedControlsLabel_Text
data.value: The following controls are in the All Controls collection, but not used in any course. Click Delete to remove all checked controls.

data.name: ViewAdditionalCourses_labelInstructions_Text
data.value: Choose additional courses to view with course "{0}".
